channel.title: Kubernetes on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Kubernetes on Arrans github.io

item.title: minio/minio
item.description: The Object Store for AI Data Infrastructure

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: xpipe-io/xpipe
item.description: Your entire server infrastructure at your fingertips

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps

item.title: traefik/traefik
item.description: The Cloud Native Application Proxy

item.title: rancher-sandbox/rancher-desktop
item.description: Container Management and Kubernetes on the Desktop

item.title: etcd-io/etcd
item.description: Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/kind
item.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

item.title: openfaas/faas
item.description: OpenFaaS - Serverless Functions Made Simple

item.title: rook/rook
item.description: Storage Orchestration for Kubernetes

item.title: kubernetes/minikube
item.description: Run Kubernetes locally

item.title: dexidp/dex
item.description: OpenID Connect (OIDC) identity and OAuth 2.0 provider with pluggable connectors

item.title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
item.description: SeaweedFS is a fast distributed storage system for blobs, objects, files, and data lake, for billions of files! Blob store has O(1) disk seek, cloud tiering. Filer supports Cloud Drive, cross-DC active-active replication, Kubernetes, POSIX FUSE mount, S3 API, S3 Gateway, Hadoop, WebDAV, encryption, Erasure Coding.

item.title: argoproj/argo-cd
item.description: Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

item.title: loft-sh/vcluster
item.description: vCluster - Create fully functional virtual Kubernetes clusters - Each vcluster runs inside a namespace of the underlying k8s cluster. It’s cheaper than creating separate full-blown clusters and it offers better multi-tenancy and isolation than regular namespaces.

item.title: cue-lang/cue
item.description: The home of the CUE language! Validate and define text-based and dynamic configuration

item.title: actions/actions-runner-controller
item.description: Kubernetes controller for GitHub Actions self-hosted runners

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: cert-manager/cert-manager
item.description: Automatically provision and manage TLS certificates in Kubernetes

item.title: cloudquery/cloudquery
item.description: The open source high performance ELT framework powered by Apache Arrow

item.title: kcl-lang/kcl
item.description: KCL Programming Language (CNCF Sandbox Project). https://kcl-lang.io

item.title: bregman-arie/sre-checklist
item.description: A checklist of anyone practicing Site Reliability Engineering

item.title: diegolnasc/kubernetes-best-practices
item.description: A cookbook with the best practices to working with kubernetes.

item.title: aws/containers-roadmap
item.description: This is the public roadmap for AWS container services (ECS, ECR, Fargate, and EKS).

item.description: My Cheatsheet Repository
